_notes: No Desert Data Center Coalition. FB presence confirmed via linktr.ee/nodesertdatacenter but exact FB URL not indexable. Also on Instagram @no_desert_data_center (20K followers) and Bluesky @nodesertdatacenter.com. Petition is for broader Tucson-area data center opposition including Marana.

Kenoshans Unite Against Microsoft Data Center - confirmed FB PAGE by founder Olivia Walker. Posts videos and infographics. Exact FB URL not retrievable via web search. Petition has 22,376 signatures (goal 25,000) as of March 2026.

Stop Project Nova. Website nodata.center confirmed active. No Facebook link found on website. Microsoft withdrew plans in Oct 2025 following community opposition. No Change.org petition found on website (used other organizing tools).

Stop the Data Center (Stop the U-M Data Center). Website confirmed. Also on Action Network and Substack (stopthedatacenter.substack.com). Hundreds of active members with multiple working groups. FB group referenced in news but exact URL not retrievable.

Citizens for Responsible Economic Development (CRED). Led by Steve Francis. Advocated against third data center in St. Joseph County. County Council rejected rezoning 7-2 in Dec 2025. No FB group or Change.org petition found via web search.
Adams County Residents for Responsible Development - confirmed FB GROUP, 1,300 members. Created by activist Nikki Gerber. No Change.org petition found specific to Adams County.

Protect Pickaway Alliance - confirmed FB page. Launched June 2025 by South Bloomfield Mayor Aaron Thomas. Coalition of villages and townships in northern Pickaway County. Admin Joe Allen. No Change.org petition found.

Carroll County Anti-Data Center Coalition by Zack Martin. FB page confirmed in news but exact URL not retrievable. Atlas Development withdrew 'Project Bus' proposal Feb 2026. Petition has 2,578 verified signatures.
W.A.T.E.R. (Woodsdale and Trenton Environmental Resistance) - confirmed FB GROUP, 248 members as of Feb 2026. Started by Barry and Lorie Blankenship. Opposing 'Project Mila' by Prologis on 141 acres.

NO DATA CENTER LMBT - confirmed FB page/group by co-founders Todd and Heather Rehrig. Website nodatacenterlmbt.com confirmed. Petition has 5,116 signatures (goal 7,500). Opposing Peron Development and J.G. Petrucci data center campus.

NIMBY Imperial - confirmed FB and Instagram pages. ~50 volunteers. Created by Francisco Leal. Petition has 2,591 signatures (goal 5,000). Also news reports 4,000+ signatures gathered offline. Valle Imperial Resiste is a separate grassroots group also opposing, founded by Gilberto Manzanerez.

Troup County Anti-Data Center Coalition - confirmed FB page by founder Gage Bailey. A Democratic candidate posted on their FB page. Also organized physical petitions at city hall Nov 2025. Troup County enacted 90-day moratorium (later extended). Exact FB URL not retrievable.

DE-CLEAR (Delaware Data Center Coalition for Local, Environmental, and Accountable Regulation). Active in regulatory advocacy via open letters. No FB group found. DNREC denied Project Washington data center application under Coastal Zone Act.

Protect Saline Township - No Data Center confirmed FB GROUP. Residents organized against Stargate/OpenAI/Oracle 250-acre, 1.4GW data center. Township initially rejected but settled after developer lawsuit. Petition has 8,966 signatures (goal 10,000).

STOP Data Centers & Rezoning in Conewago Twp. - confirmed FB GROUP. Township official posted in group. Also a second petition at change.org/p/stop-ai-data-centers-in-conewago-township-york-co. Opposing Elysian Partners rezoning proposals. Petition has 872 signatures (goal 1,000).

Stop the Greenleaf Data Center - confirmed FB GROUP, 3,000 members. Admin: Jayne Black. Created morning of Jan 7, 2026. Village has only 900 residents. Cloverleaf Infrastructure withdrew project due to community opposition Jan 2026. Physical and digital petitions circulated but no Change.org petition found.

No Data Center in DeForest - confirmed FB GROUP, 4,100+ members. Website nodatacenterdeforest.com confirmed. QTS proposed $12B project; DeForest Village Board unanimously rejected annexation. Community gathered 1,100+ petition signatures in 6 days for annexation referendum. QTS withdrew Feb 2026.

Downriver United 734 (part of Indivisible). Co-founded by Jessica Schering. Organized protest ahead of Allen Park Planning Commission meeting. 125+ people attended 4-hour public meeting, nearly all opposed. Planning commission postponed decision. Active on Mobilize.us and Bluesky. No dedicated FB group found for data center opposition specifically.

Michiganders Against Data Centers - confirmed FB GROUP, statewide coalition. Organized Capitol rally Dec 16, 2025 drawing 100+ from across state. Petition for Van Buren Township specifically has 1,511 signatures (goal 2,500). Opposing 'Project Cannoli' 1-gigawatt data center by Panattoni on 280 acres.

We Are Mason County KY - confirmed FB PAGE at facebook.com/nodatacenter with 2,600 followers. Website wearemasoncountyky.org confirmed with FB link. Group president Max Moran. Mission: ensure residents are educated about proposed data center. Goal to preserve farmland and restrict data centers to industrial parks.

Coalition for Community Centered Data Centers in Southern Maryland. Includes members from Strong Towns Charles County. Published open letter to planning commission calling for community benefit agreements, union agreements, local hiring. 160 people attended public hearing. No FB group found via web search.

GASP (Greater Birmingham Alliance to Stop Pollution) - established 501(c)(3) since 2009. Website gaspgroup.org confirmed. FB page facebook.com/GASPinc. Community Science Coordinator Zion Sharpe spoke before city council. Published 'Birmingham Residents Must Stay Engaged on the Proposed Data Center' on their site.

Climate Revolution Action Network (CRAN) - 501(c)(4) founded 2024. Website climaterevolutionnj.org confirmed. 13,000+ Gen Z members statewide, 55,000+ followers across digital platforms. On Instagram (5.9k), TikTok (34.8k followers, 1.9M likes). No FB page. Successfully stopped New Brunswick data center - proposal pulled from council docket.

Center for Coalfield Justice - environmental justice nonprofit in SW Pennsylvania. FB page facebook.com/coalfieldjustice confirmed via website schema markup. Website confirmed. Hosted community meeting on 1,500-acre CNX Resources tract marketed by JLL for data center. Petition has 728 signatures. No active data center application as of March 2026.

Keyser Valley Neighborhood Association. President: Gary DiBileo. Organized opposition to proposed data center uphill from flood-prone Keyser Valley in Scranton. Ransom Township supervisors denied data center zoning application. No FB group or Change.org petition found via web search.

KC Data Center Watchdog - confirmed FB presence. Co-founded by Katie Currid after spike in Evergy bills. Created to keep community informed. Advocates for Port KC restrictions and against sales tax incentives for data centers. Also publishes newsletter. Exact FB URL not retrievable via web search.

Hyndman Homesites Homeowners Association. President: Randy Fox. Wrote letter to county commissioners about aquifer drilling, gas turbine emissions, wastewater ponds, wildlife corridors. County commissioners unanimously approved Project Jade (Crusoe) data center campus anyway. No FB group or Change.org petition found.

No Data Centers Hobart Indiana - confirmed FB GROUP at facebook.com/groups/hobartnodatacenters with 4,000+ members. Led by Angelita Soriano. Website hobartdatacenters.org confirmed (has local petition with 268 signatures + FB link). Change.org petition has 2,787 signatures (goal 5,000). Group is suing city for bypassing required steps. Also: separate petition at change.org/p/stop-data-center-developments-in-northwest-indiana (147 signatures).

No specific opposition Facebook group or petition found for Clark Township. The moratorium was preemptive. Broader Michigan opposition organized via EDRA of MI and Title Track Michigan statewide groups.

Change.org petition 'Prevent the construction of a data center in Dundee, MI' with 550+ signatures. No dedicated FB group found via web search, though community organized via existing local FB pages and in-person meetings. Cloverleaf Infrastructure retracted pre-development agreement after public pushback.

opposition_groups: Residents United for a Healthy Lowell
_notes: Two Change.org petitions: 'Big Tech Wants Our Community. Lowell, MI and Great Lakes Allies Say NO' and 'No Lowell Data Center'. Organized by Betsy Lopez-Wagner. Microsoft revealed as company behind Franklin Lowell LLC in Jan 2026. Public hearings shut down due to massive turnout. Exact signature counts and FB URL not retrievable.

Northville enacted a preemptive 12-month moratorium on Jan 6, 2026 without facing any specific data center proposals. No opposition Facebook group or petition found. The moratorium was proactive rather than reactive.

Stop the Data Center (stopthedatacenter.org) is the main opposition group against U-M/Los Alamos data center in Ypsilanti Township. Hundreds of active members across multiple working groups. Also on Action Network (actionnetwork.org/groups/stop-the-data-center) and Substack. Note: Ypsilanti City moratorium is separate from Ypsilanti Township opposition, but same community group is active across both.

No specific opposition Facebook group, petition, or coalition found for Abilene Stargate/Crusoe/Lancium project. Abilene has generally embraced the data center development. The Texas Tribune reference to '3,000 signatures and Facebook group' pertains to a Lacy Lakeview/Waco-area project, not Abilene.

Change.org petition 'Stop College Station land sale for Crypto mine' with 5,976 signatures. 5,047 signatures delivered to city council meeting. City Council voted unanimously to reject Priority Power land sale on Sept 12, 2025. 75+ speakers at public meeting. Also nobitcoinmining.com website referenced.

Change.org petition 'STOP AI DATA CENTER Lufkin, TX' created Feb 6, 2026. Petition against Amp Z data center at Southland Paper Mill site ($1.05B capital investment). No dedicated FB group found via web search.

No specific opposition Facebook group, petition, or coalition found for Pecos County/Pacifico Energy project. TCEQ approved the project. Located in remote area 17 miles north of Fort Stockton which may limit organized local opposition.

Change.org petition 'Oppose third reading of Ordinance 2026-01 in Marion County' opposing Stream Data Centers (Project Liberty). Council hastily approved tax breaks during winter storm. Residents packed council meeting in opposition. No dedicated FB group found.

Sierra Club Toiyabe filed appeal of Webb Data Center approval by Reno Planning Commission on Dec 18, 2024. Appeal heard by Reno City Council Jan 22, 2025. No dedicated FB group or petition found specific to Webb Data Center.

opposition_groups: Coalition for Responsible Data Center Development
_notes: Coalition for Responsible Data Center Development (CRDCD) - 501(c)(3) and 501(c)(4) nonprofit founded by Kathy Johnson of Farmington. Website: datacenterresponsibility.com. FB page 'Coalition for Responsible Data Center Development' with ~370 members. Eagan enacted first-of-its-kind moratorium on large data centers. Also: Minnesota Center for Environmental Advocacy and CURE involved at state level.

Stop MPRP, Inc. is 501(c)(4) opposing Maryland Piedmont Reliability Project (high-voltage lines across Baltimore, Carroll, and Frederick Counties driven by data center energy demand). Founded by Joanne Frederick. Carroll County commissioners voted to draft moratorium despite no active data center proposals. MPRP is 67-mile, $424M transmission line project. No Carroll County-specific data center FB group found.

Same Stop MPRP organization covers Baltimore County. Woodlawn data center proposal (Security Land and Development LP, 150MW, 42 acres) sparked community opposition. Residents wore 'NO DATA CENTERS' shirts at Woodlawn High School meeting (~100 attendees). Equity concerns raised about siting in majority-minority area. Baltimore County Council passed moratorium. No dedicated Baltimore County FB group found.

Massive grassroots opposition to Active Infrastructure $2B data center. Over 200 comments filed against vs 8 in favor. Andy and Carrie Hoefer organized door-knocking (200 doors) and 2,000 postcards. City Council voted unanimously to reject Dec 11, 2025. Former Sen. Kyrsten Sinema lobbied for project as AI Infrastructure Coalition co-chair. No dedicated FB group or Change.org petition found.

Greensparc proposed small-scale data center (3.5MW, 10,000 sq ft) at former 6-Mile Mill site. Planning commission voted 3-2 to recommend lease after 2 hours of public testimony. Cordova resident warned their Greensparc data center 'has been underwhelming and underperforming.' No opposition FB group or petition found.

Platte County Presiding Commissioner Scott Fricker publicly opposes 'Project Kestrel' ($100B data center campus). Six hyperscale data centers totaling 1.8M sq ft on 379 acres at KCI-29 mega site. Opposition is primarily from county officials rather than organized citizen group. No dedicated FB group or petition found.

Change.org petition 'Stop the AI data centers in Lawrence County, Ohio' with 5,178 signatures. Multiple Facebook groups created over weekend after Strata Expanse ribbon cutting, but specific group names and URLs not retrievable. Also a second petition: 'Stop the data centers in Lawrence County, Ohio from opening'. Ironton City Council members also expressed surprise at project proceeding without public notice.

Change.org petition 'Muhlenberg TWP and Community Against Data Center and/or Power Distribution Build'. Brian Cooper organized both online and in-person petition with 1,000+ signatures. Pacifico Energy of San Juan Capistrano, CA behind the proposal. Trustees enacted 12-month moratorium (Resolution 2026-10). No dedicated FB group found.

Meta $800M data center in Wood County's Middleton Township. ~150 residents packed Wood County Planning Commission meeting. NDAs kept Meta name secret even after construction began. Trustees withdrew rezoning requests for additional 112 acres. No dedicated FB group or Change.org petition found via web search.

Note: This entry likely references Augusta Township near Milan in MICHIGAN (Washtenaw County), not Ohio. In Michigan, Protect Augusta Charter Township (PACT) collected 957 signatures for referendum ballot initiative to reverse rezoning for $1B Thor Equities data center. FB group 'Protect Augusta Township - NO to Data Center' referenced in news but URL not retrievable. Special election expected May 2026 at earliest.

Dearborn County commissioners approved 12-month moratorium on solar farms, battery storage, and data centers on Feb 25, 2026. Community meeting at South Dearborn High School. 1,700+ signatures on petition opposing commercial solar (bundled with data center moratorium). No dedicated data center FB group found.

Franklin County commissioners placed year-long moratorium on data centers (until Feb 24, 2027). Planning Commission reviewing Article 19 zoning code. No dedicated FB group or petition found specific to Franklin County, IN data centers.

Facebook group 'No Data Centers, Fulton County' created by James Zimmerman (Akron resident). 2,600+ members in county of ~20,000 people. Decennial Group proposed 500MW data center near Akron (300 acres, $100-150M infrastructure). Fulton County commissioners approved 12-month moratorium March 3, 2026. Exact FB URL not retrievable via web search.

opposition_groups: Tobyhanna Township Residents Against Caughbaugh Road Data Center
_notes: TTRACRDC (Tobyhanna Township Residents Against Caughbaugh Road Data Center) filed validity challenge to data center overlay zoning. Hired lawyer for 'unlawful spot zoning' challenge. Petition to commissioners signed by ~3,000 people (about twice township population). Pennsylvania Glacial Till LLC (NJ company) proposed 8-building campus on Caughbaugh Road off Route 115. Zoning hearing March 11, 2026. PA statewide anti-data center FB group set up Jan 9 topped 500 members. No dedicated Tobyhanna FB group URL found.
